# MEOK Industries — 8 verticals, all live

> 8 industry vertical pages, each with their own EU AI Act + sector-framework compliance view. All 8 share the same 32-server MEOK compliance MCP fleet — what changes is the regulator.

## MEOK for Fintech
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/fintech
- Tagline: Fintech AI compliance — Article 50 + DORA + FCA SYSC 8 + UK AI Bill
- Top obligations: EU AI Act Article 6 + Annex III (3) — credit scoring = high-risk, DORA Article 17 — ICT incident reporting, FCA SYSC 8 — operational resilience for AI, UK AI Bill — frontier model + AISI sharing
- 3 case studies: UK Challenger Bank, UK RegTech, EU payments
- 3 MCP tools: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, dora-compliance-mcp, agent-commerce-protocol-mcp

## MEOK for Healthtech
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/healthtech
- Tagline: Healthtech AI compliance — Article 50 + SaMD + HIPAA + FDA AI/ML
- Top obligations: EU AI Act Annex III (5) — medical device AI = high-risk, EU MDR — Medical Device Regulation, FDA AI/ML SaMD — Software as a Medical Device guidance, HIPAA — PHI handling, BAA generator
- 3 case studies: UK Telemedicine, EU MedTech scaleup, US Health Insurer
- 3 MCP tools: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, fda-samd-mcp, hipaa-compliance-mcp

## MEOK for HR-Tech
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/hrtech
- Tagline: HR-tech AI compliance — Article 50 + NYC LL144 + EU Platform Work Directive
- Top obligations: EU AI Act Annex III (4) — recruitment AI = high-risk, NYC Local Law 144 — automated employment decision tools, EU Platform Work Directive — algorithmic management, UK Employment Rights Bill — AI in workplace
- 3 case studies: UK HR-tech scaleup, EU ATS platform, US HR-tech unicorn
- 3 MCP tools: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, meok-mcp-injection-scan-mcp, bias-detection-mcp

## MEOK for Care Homes
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/care-homes
- Tagline: Care-home AI compliance — CQC + UK AI Bill + LA tender
- Top obligations: EU AI Act Annex III (5) — social services AI = high-risk, CQC 'Safe' key question — AI governance evidence required, UK AI Bill — 14 LA commissioner visibility, Care ethics — 4 dimensions, 16 probes (Care Membrane)
- 3 case studies: UK Domiciliary Care, UK Care Home Group, UK Care Tech vendor
- 3 MCP tools: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, care-membrane-mcp, meok-compliance-passport-mcp

## MEOK for Public Sector
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/public-sector
- Tagline: Public-sector AI compliance — GOV.UK + Cabinet Office + AISI
- Top obligations: EU AI Act — government AI deployer obligations, UK AI Bill — public sector + AISI framework, GOV.UK AI Playbook — sovereign UK infrastructure, Procurement Policy Note 02/24 — AI in public procurement
- 3 case studies: UK Central Government, UK Local Authority, UK GovTech vendor
- 3 MCP tools: uk-ai-bill-compliance-mcp, eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, csoai-governance-crosswalk-mcp

## MEOK for RegTech
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/regtech
- Tagline: RegTech — white-label the MEOK compliance fleet
- Top obligations: GRC partner brand on every signed cert, 30% rev share on every audit you bring us, Zero engineering — we run the audit, you own the client, Multi-tenant provisioning, co-branded receipts
- 3 case studies: UK GRC boutique, EU Privacy consultancy, AI safety research
- 3 MCP tools: meok-governance-engine-mcp, csoai-governance-crosswalk-mcp, meok-compliance-passport-mcp

## MEOK for Legal
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/legal
- Tagline: Legal AI compliance — Toronto + Montreal + EU AI Act + UK AISI
- Top obligations: EU AI Act — legal AI is high-risk per Annex III (8), Toronto Declaration on AI, Montreal Declaration for Responsible AI, UK AISI + Law Society of England & Wales guidance
- 3 case studies: UK Magic Circle firm, US Legal AI scaleup, EU Legal Tech vendor
- 3 MCP tools: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, csoai-governance-crosswalk-mcp, ai-bill-readiness-mcp

## MEOK for Insurance
- URL: https://meok.ai/industries/insurance
- Tagline: Insurance AI compliance — Article 50 + Solvency II + IDD + FCA
- Top obligations: EU AI Act — insurance AI = high-risk per Annex III (5, 6, 7), Solvency II — Pillar 2 governance for AI, IDD — Insurance Distribution Directive, FCA + PRA + EIOPA — model risk management principles
- 3 case studies: UK Insurer, EU Insurtech, US Insurer
- 3 MCP tools: eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp, dora-compliance-mcp, iso-27001-mcp

## Pricing (same for all 8)
- Free: £0 — 200 calls/day per MCP
- Pro: £199/mo — 1,000 calls/day, signed Ed25519 receipts
- Enterprise: £1,499/mo — multi-tenant, co-branded
- 48h Assessment: £5,000 — full audit + signed cert

## Live deadline
EU AI Act Article 50: 2 August 2026 (49 days)

CSOAI Ltd · UK 16939677 · hello@meok.ai
